backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with portfolio CRUD endpoints (admin-only) and user profile endpoints, using access control authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Education.tsx component implements a polished four-milestone alternating timeline with sky-blue markers and scroll animations.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, used as a build-planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main.tsx module entry point, titled 'Sulekha Sahoo Portfolio'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (home, /admin login, /admin/dashboard), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, and renders a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About Me section with a workspace illustration, bio text, a declaration blockquote, language badges, and scroll-triggered entrance animations.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a two-panel layout featuring contact info cards and a validated contact form with loading state, success screen, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Education.tsx: Renders an animated vertical timeline of Sulekha's academic history (secondary school through PGDCA diploma) with scroll-triggered animations and alternating left/right card layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand logo, social media links, navigation links, and contact info, with a copyright line and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' credit.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated headline, subheading, decorative blobs, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the Work and About sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll anchor links, a 'Hire Me' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio section that fetches items via a custom hook, supports category filtering (All, Branding, Social Media, Print Media), and renders a masonry grid with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a 'Services' section with three animated cards (Logo Design, Poster Design, Social Media Management), each with an icon, description, and feature list using scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/Skills.tsx: Renders a 'Skills' section displaying four design tool proficiency cards (Photoshop, Illustrator, CorelDRAW, InDesign) with custom SVG icons and scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/usePortfolioItems.ts: Custom hook that fetches portfolio items from the ICP backend actor using React Query, with a 30-second stale time and actor-availability guard.
frontend/src/hooks/usePortfolioMutations: Custom hook exposing add, replace, edit, and delete mutations for portfolio items against the ICP backend, with query invalidation on success and optional upload progress callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a ref and visibility boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (sky, coral, ink, surface) in both light and dark modes, plus utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page protected by Internet Identity authentication, providing a quick upload form and portfolio grid for managing portfolio items with add/edit/delete functionality.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page that uses Internet Identity for authentication and redirects to the dashboard upon successful login.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans, Syne), a design-token-based color palette (sky, coral, ink, surface), border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 17) describing the Sulekha Sahoo portfolio website's existing features, architectural notes, and ongoing work to add an Internet Identity-protected admin dashboard for portfolio management.
